title: Pressure Points
wikitext:
[[File:Nani.gif|thumb|right|400px|By striking pressure points, [[Kenshiro (Hokuto no Ken)|Kenshiro]] can make his opponents explode violently]]

==Summary==
'''Pressure Points''' are a concept in many Eastern martial arts, referring to special parts of the body that, when struck, can cause intense pain, paralysis, and potentially even death, among many other possible effects, some of which are more beneficial.

==Possible Uses==
*[[Pain Manipulation|Causing unbearable pain to an opponent]]
*[[Paralysis Inducement|Paralyzing an opponent, partially or completely]]
*Killing an opponent in a single move
*Strengthening the user's body, or the body of an ally
*Relieving fatigue or other debilitating effects
*[[Healing|Initiating or accelerating the healing of a user's body, or an ally's body]]

==Users==
*[[Ty Lee]] ([[Avatar: The Last Airbender]])
*[[Tai Lung]] ([[Kung Fu Panda]])
*[[Psylocke]] ([[Marvel Comics]])
*[[Ip Man (Donnie Yen)|Ip Man]] ([[Ip Man (Film Series)|Ip Man]])
*[[Chelsea]] ([[Akame ga Kill!]])
